block_00: 42 trading tournaments with a total prize pool of $34,500! Jump in!
block_06: This is the last week of the First IQ Option Social Trading Cup tournament series! We are ready to announce the two strongest countries of the entire competition — Argentina and Brazil! block_07: Get acquainted with the schedule and jump in to win prizes.👇
block_14: Please note, that you can only sign up for the tournaments where your country participates.

block_16: *One will get a share of the prize fund only in case of winning the tournament.
